<!-- done: 2026-03-18 -->
# Quick-Win Polish Items

## 1. Remove ICE Warnings

**Status:** `[ICE] lower: missing type for expr id=N` appears on stderr every time
**Cause:** Fresh vars generated by `instantiate_ty` have expr_ids not registered in the checker's `expr_types`. The lower pass fails to find them with `expr_types.get(id)` and emits ICE
**Fix:** When `instantiate_ty` returns a new InferTy, also add the corresponding expr_id to Ty mapping in `infer_types`. Or change the lower pass `expr_ty()` to use silent fallback instead of warning on missing
**Estimate:** 1 hour

## 2. Integration Tests 8/12 -> 12/12

**Status:** 4 files in `spec/integration/` are failing
**Verification:** `./target/debug/almide test spec/integration/`
**Fix:** Same approach as spec/lang, checking and fixing errors one file at a time
**Estimate:** Half a day (faster since we have experience from spec/lang)

## 3. TS Target E2E Tests

**Status:** Implemented TS Result preservation but no tests that actually execute the generated code
**Fix:** Add E2E tests with Deno: `./target/debug/almide build test.almd --target ts -o test.ts && deno run test.ts`
**Estimate:** Half a day
